node.title: Looking for a peer for interview preparation [SDE-2/L4]

article.title: Looking for a peer for interview preparation [SDE-2/L4]
article.content:
Hi,

I have nearly 4 yoe as a Software Engineer and currently have interviews lined up with Google, Amazon, Uber in next 1 month.

I am looking for a similar partner who are already preparing for HLD, LLD, DSA and are looking for a peer to discuss/evaluate their preparation and have mock interviews to improve more.

[Update]: I got offers from Google and Uber, Amazon I haven't given bar raiser round as I already got 2 good offers

My LC profile:
![image.png](https://assets.leetcode.com/users/images/bbb433e1-57c7-479d-95a7-59abdd5c7ea0_1742067273.70483.png)

post.content: I have an interview for SDE 2/L5 soon, lets connect\nhttps://www.linkedin.com/in/nishant-routray-081222111/
I have interview lined up for google and Uber in next one month.\nLets connect: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ramchandra-yadav-4596b4194/
If you haven\'t paired up with anyone as of now, we can connect. kaisarnajar11114@gmail.com\n
Hey, I am available for mock interview for DSA. send me a connection request with `add to note` feature on [https://www.linkedin.com/in/bharatbardiya/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bharatbardiya/)
Hey, even I have these interviews coming up. Can we connect for the mocks?
Hey I am also interested in mocks
Hey I have similar rounds coming up for FAANG interviews\nPlease email me at saurabhrathi1234@gmail.com
I am also preparing for HLD, LLD, DSA with having an experience of 5 years in backend development

Hi, 

I have 2 yoe and I am also looking for switch. I have been practising the DSA on leetcode, we could pair up.
We could chat over linkedin : https://www.linkedin.com/in/yashmandaviya/

I have 1.5 YOE and looking for a switch. Although I dont really do contests but you can check out my profile here on leetcode. In the past I have done a lot of mocks, specifically for FAANG. Anyways hit me up on discord - none4856
That is a lot of LC problems you solved. If you have trouble finding a good partner, check out paid ones like meetapro or interviewingio.
i would like to be your preparation partner for these upcoming interviews of your , as it would be beneficial for both of us and will help growing each other\n
